title: Marketing Associate
summary: Boru has strong marketing campaign analytics and multi-channel execution experience that aligns with the role's performance-tracking and campaign coordination needs, and her fintech/startup background fits ACE Alternatives' sector focus well. However, the role prioritises content creation, writing, and social media output rather than data analytics, which is where her CV is weighted. The most significant risk is German language: the JD requires Fluent German, while Boru is at B1+, which is likely below the bar.
bonus_skills: Previous internship or experience in marketing
Interest in startups, VC, or tech
matched_skills: Marketing campaign experience (4+ years across multiple roles)
missing_skills: Content writing and social media content creation
Email newsletter and blog post authoring
core_responsibilities: Plan and execute cross-channel marketing campaigns
Create and curate content for social media, email newsletters, and blog posts
Support event coordination and product launch communications
Maintain brand consistency across all touchpoints
Track campaign performance and suggest improvements based on insights
recommended_emphasis: Highlight campaign performance tracking and ROI analytics experience across multiple marketing roles
Emphasise fintech and startup exposure (HSBC digital transformation, IoT/FinTech sector experience)
Showcase any content writing samples, newsletter contributions, or social media work — even if peripheral
Leverage Master in Management & Entrepreneurship to signal startup mindset alignment
Quantify cross-channel campaign outcomes (conversion rates, lead funnel results) to demonstrate tangible impact
risk_flags: German language gap: JD requires Fluent German; CV shows B1+ — this is likely a hard filter
Role is associate-level (entry/junior) but candidate has 4+ years of experience — potential overqualification concern
CV is analytics/data-heavy; JD emphasises writing, content creation, and brand work — skill emphasis mismatch
In-person Berlin requirement: candidate is based in Lüneburg, relocation not mentioned
